domains.runtimeCopy: .agents/skills/<skill>/SKILL.md for canonical final names, intermediate aliases, and old compatibility aliases only
domains.historicalArchive: None in this pass unless a file is explicitly marked historical
domains.driftControl: byte identity between canonical, runtime, and distribution copies

domains.runtimeCopy: .codex/agents/*.toml for the five active project custom agents only
domains.historicalArchive: Existing non-active agent specs remain top-level documented assets
domains.driftControl: manifest hashes plus TOML field validation for active agents

domains.historicalArchive: Older compiled-agent versions remain explicit drift until provenance is updated
domains.driftControl: manifest hashes; no broad version restamp in this pass
byte identity for mirrored registry files

domains.historicalArchive: restricted or historical sources remain marked in provenance
restricted/reference-only source records stay explicitly marked
domains.driftControl: neverAutoImport plus source-record and watchlist validation

domains.distributionCopy: not emitted in the current embedded package; profile registry mirror remains packaged
domains.historicalArchive: older profile notes only if marked
domains.driftControl: top-level profile files plus registry reference validation
JSON parse and expected routing-case validation

domains.historicalArchive: old scripts remain top-level until a later cleanup PR
domains.driftControl: command allowlist, unsafe-command scan, and manifest hashes
